message:
feat: Add pyAnyEql for Python-style generic equality comparison

- Add runtime.pyAnyEql() that handles any two types with Python semantics
- Returns false for different types (Python behavior)
- Handles optional types by unwrapping before comparison
- Supports ArrayList, tuples, sets, dicts with proper NaN identity semantics

Fix comparison codegen to use pyAnyEql for unknown types instead of
bigIntCompare, which was incorrectly used for list/tuple/set/dict
comparisons from tuple unpacking.

Fix @hasField guard in assertions to check for struct type first,
preventing errors on null types.

Fix inline for discard handling and tuple unpacking variable tracking.

test_tuple.py: 31 tests pass
test_bool.py: 77 tests pass
test_int.py: 218 tests pass
